name: fable-orchestrator
description: Fable 5-first multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code: a token-frugal chair profile with tier routing (Sonnet 5 does the work), a Requirements Ledger, guard hooks that enforce the discipline, and automatic teammate reaping.
